name: ExtensionQuestionnaireResponse_Identifier
title: R5: Business identifier for this set of answers
purpose:
This extension is part of the cross-version definitions generated to enable use of the
element `QuestionnaireResponse.identifier` as defined in FHIR R5
in FHIR R4.

The source element is defined as:
`QuestionnaireResponse.identifier` 0..* `Identifier`

Across FHIR versions, the element set has been mapped as:
*  R5: `QuestionnaireResponse.identifier` 0..* `Identifier`
*  R4B: `QuestionnaireResponse.identifier` 0..1 `Identifier`
*  R4: `QuestionnaireResponse.identifier` 0..1 `Identifier`

Following are the generation technical comments:
Element `QuestionnaireResponse.identifier` allows multiple values in the source, but is mapped to an element that does not allow multiple values in the target.
Element `QuestionnaireResponse.identifier` is mapped to FHIR R4 element `QuestionnaireResponse.identifier` as `SourceIsBroaderThanTarget`.

element.short: R5: Business identifier for this set of answers
element.comment:
Element `QuestionnaireResponse.identifier` allows multiple values in the source, but is mapped to an element that does not allow multiple values in the target.
Element `QuestionnaireResponse.identifier` is mapped to FHIR R4 element `QuestionnaireResponse.identifier` as `SourceIsBroaderThanTarget`.
Note: This is a business identifier, not a resource identifier (see [discussion](https://hl7.org/fhir/resource.htm#identifiers)).

element.short: Business identifier for this set of answers
element.definition: Business identifiers assigned to this questionnaire response by the performer and/or other systems.  These identifiers remain constant as the resource is updated and propagates from server to server.
element.comment: Note: This is a business identifier, not a resource identifier (see [discussion](https://hl7.org/fhir/resource.htm#identifiers)).
